title: The Most Recent Orders for Each Product
description: Find the most recent order(s) for each product. Include all if tied on date.
constraints: order_id is the primary key of Orders
product_id is the primary key of Products
Multiple orders for the same product on the same latest date must all be included (ties kept)
Result ordered by product_name ASC, product_id ASC, order_id ASC
key_concept: Filter with (product_id, order_date) IN (SELECT product_id, MAX(order_date) ...).

hints.L1: For each product, find the maximum order_date. Return all orders matching that date.
hints.L2: (o.product_id, o.order_date) IN (SELECT product_id, MAX(order_date) FROM Orders GROUP BY product_id)
hints.L3: SELECT p.product_name, o.product_id, o.order_id, o.order_date FROM Orders o JOIN Products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id WHERE (o.product_id, o.order_date) IN (SELECT product_id, MAX(order_date) FROM Orders GROUP BY product_id) ORDER BY p.product_name, o.product_id, o.order_id

optimal_solution:
SELECT p.product_name, o.product_id, o.order_id, o.order_date
FROM Orders o JOIN Products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE (o.product_id, o.order_date) IN (SELECT product_id, MAX(order_date) FROM Orders GROUP BY product_id)
ORDER BY p.product_name, o.product_id, o.order_id;
